rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 13, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED to the extent Chicago Title Insurance Company is still being named as Defendant. This ruling does not address service on or propriety/sufficiency of allegations against Chicago Title Company, a named defendant in this action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORA SILVERMAN VS. MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compliance And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 13, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT MURPHY SAN FRANCISCO LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC.and BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY's Motion And Motion To Compliance And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED as follows: CCP 2031.320 applies and (1) Plaintiff shall personally serve Defendant with verified response to Request for Production #37 attesting that there are no responsive documents no later than June 14, 2013; or (2) Plaintiff shall personally serve Defendant with documents responsive to Defendant's Request for Production #37 no later than June 14, 2013. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. = (501/REQ)
